lyrics.text: File 82-712, Agent Rick Dicker interrogating. State your name, please.
State your name, please. Uh, Tony? Tony Ridinger?
Tony Ridinger? Tell me about the incident. Well, there's this girl in my class.
Well, there's this girl in my class. I saw her at the track meet.
I saw her at the track meet. You're, uh, Viola, right? That's me. I sort of knew her, but she changed. Relaxed. She was more sure of herself.
I sort of knew her, but she changed. Relaxed. She was more sure of herself. Cool. Cute. I asked her out to a movie.
Cool. Cute. I asked her out to a movie. So, Friday? Friday. And I went to watch the movie.
So, Friday? Friday. And I went to watch the movie. Friday? Friday. And I went to watch the track meet.
Friday? Friday. And I went to watch the track meet. Not long after, this thing happened in the parking lot.
Not long after, this thing happened in the parking lot. Behold the Underminer!
Behold the Underminer! I have no place beneath you!
I have no place beneath you! As if things aren't weird enough,
As if things aren't weird enough, I look over and I see these boots. You two stay here. Wait, should we be doing this?
You two stay here. Wait, should we be doing this? It is still illegal.
Wait, should we be doing this? It is still illegal. They look like superheroes. We're gonna lose it. Oh, all right.
We're gonna lose it. Oh, all right. One of you patrol the perimeter. Keep the crowds back and safe. The other, watch after Jack-Jack. But I thought we were gonna go...
Keep the crowds back and safe. The other, watch after Jack-Jack. But I thought we were gonna go... You heard your mother!
The other, watch after Jack-Jack. But I thought we were gonna go... You heard your mother! Trampoline me. I saw a perimeter!
I saw a perimeter! We're not going anywhere! It's an Omagate Creek! I see my chance to get out of there.
It's an Omagate Creek! I see my chance to get out of there. But there's something familiar about one of the kids' voices.
But there's something familiar about one of the kids' voices. The girl, she's upset and she throws down her mask and...
The girl, she's upset and she throws down her mask and... And it's her!
And it's her! Oh, Tony! Hi. Uh, this isn't what you think it is. It was just getting too freaky. I couldn't handle it and ran off.
It was just getting too freaky. I couldn't handle it and ran off. I feel kind of bad about it. Maybe I should have said hi or something?
I feel kind of bad about it. Maybe I should have said hi or something? It's not her fault superheroes are illegal.
It's not her fault superheroes are illegal. And it's not like I don't like strong girls.
It's not her fault superheroes are illegal. And it's not like I don't like strong girls. I'm pretty secure, manhood-wise. What is that?
I'm pretty secure, manhood-wise. What is that? Have you told anyone else about this? Your parents? No, they'd only think I was hiding something.
Your parents? No, they'd only think I was hiding something. You know what I mean? Sure, kid.
You know what I mean? Sure, kid. I like this girl, Mr. Digger. I'm supposed to go out with her Friday night.
I'm supposed to go out with her Friday night. Now things are just gonna be weird. I wish I could forget I ever saw her in that suit.
I wish I could forget I ever saw her in that suit. You will, kid.
You will, kid. You will. You will.
